card.name: Unfortunate Shipmender
card.text: {3}{W}: Unfortunate Shipmender gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Evaporate — {5}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Valey Gateguard
card.text: As long as it's your turn, Valey Gateguard has first strike. Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Merchant of the Underpass
card.text: When Merchant of the Underpass enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target tapped creature. {1}, {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Fogbound Elemental
card.text: As long as you control five or more lands, Fogbound Elemental has flying.

card.name: Mistborn Unicorn
card.text: Mistborn Unicorn gets +0/+1 for each land you control.

card.name: Drowned Harpy
card.text: Evaporate — {3}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Desiccated Mothling
card.text: Flying Evaporate — {3}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Destroy target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Yarkasing Champion
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Lost in the Fog
card.text: When Lost in the Fog enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Lost in the Fog leaves. Whenever a permanent you control transforms, you may exile Lost in the Fog. If you do, return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Shatter the Spoils
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact, enchantment or battle. • Scry X, where X is the power of target creature you control, then draw a card.

card.name: Clear Up
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature. Evaporate — {1}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Quickdraw
card.text: Target attacking creature you control gains first strike until end of turn. If that creature's power is higher than its toughness, scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Convert
card.text: Flying, vigilance Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power 5 or greater, return Convert from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Convert
Mistcowl Awakener
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Mistcowl Awakener attacks, you may return target permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. When you do, you may transform that permanent.

card.name: Crystophylax, Ethereal
card.text: Flying Crystophylax, Ethereal enters with your choice of a vigilance or lifelink counter on it. Whenever Crystophylax attacks, exile up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Submerged Paragon
card.text: Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, you gain 1 life. Evaporate — {2}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return another target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield that was put there from the battlefield this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hatebear
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Activated abilities of cards in graveyards can't be activated.

card.name: Virtue and Sin
Ethereal Burdener
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Ethereal Burdener becomes tapped, you may pay {1}. When you do, tap target creature.

card.name: Valey Battalion Captain
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Valey Battalion Captain becomes tapped, target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Quickdraw Thug
card.text: During your turn, Quickdraw Thug has first strike. Whenever Quickdraw Thug deals combat damage to a player, scry X, where X is its power.

card.name: Valeyan Martial Guard
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Valeyan Martial Guard attacks, if it has power 3 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control.

card.name: Allwatch Angel
card.text: Flying, vigilance Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) When Allwatch Angel converts a creature, put a vigilance counter on that creature.

card.name: Scout of the Great Plains
card.text: When Scout of the Great Plains enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a Plains card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Allwatch Guardian
card.text: Flash When Allwatch Guardian enters, you may return another target permanent you control to its owner's hand. Whenever a permanent you control transforms, create a 2/2 white Elemental creature token.

card.name: Curious Treasure Diver
card.text: Vigilance Evaporate — {1}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Search your library for an artifact or enchantment card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Whiteclam Etherealist
card.text: When Whiteclam Etherealist enters, scry 2. Evaporate — {1}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Resurfacing the Meek
card.text: Return target creature you control with power 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Destination Unveiled
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control transforms, you gain 2 life. If this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Struggle to Subdue
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller gains X life, where X is the difference in power between that creature and target creature you control.

card.name: Dredge Diver
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Gemchannel Golem
card.text: Gemchannel Golem gets +0/+1 for each charge counter on it. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Gemchannel Golem: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to activate abilities or cast noncreature spells.

card.name: Merchant of the North
card.text: When Merchant of the North enters, create a Treasure token. {1}, {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Exhumed Corvid
card.text: Flying Evaporate — {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a flying counter on target creature.

card.name: Opaelian Generator
card.text: Vigilance {U}, {T}: Put a charge counter on target artifact you control.

card.name: Fogscry Sphinx
card.text: Flying {2}{U}, {T}: Scry 2. You may reveal the top card of your library. If it's a land card, put it into your hand.

card.name: Wash Ashore
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell. Evaporate — {2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Disenchanting Fog
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and hexproof until end of turn. Scry 1. If you control a Mist, draw a card instead.

card.name: Charge Burst
card.text: Put a charge counter on each of up to two target artifacts you control. Draw a card.

card.name: Wave Stall
card.text: Draw two cards. Creatures your opponents control get -2/-0 until end of turn.

card.name: Reflective Prison
card.text: Enchant creature When Reflective Prison enters, you may create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Enchanted creature has base power and toughness 0/2 and loses all abilities.

card.name: Drowned Memories
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Evaporate — {2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target player mills four cards.

card.name: Envelop in Mist
card.text: Choose one — • Target attacking creature gets -X/-0, where X is the number of lands you control. • Return target artifact or enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Frigid Chargemaster
card.text: Whenever one or more charge counters are put on one or more artifacts you control, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. {1}{U}, Remove a charge counter from Frigid Chargemaster: Draw a card.

card.name: Reflective Fogwing
card.text: Flying Whenever Reflective Fogwing or another creature you control enters, you may transform target land you control. When you do, create a Reflective Mist land token with "{T}: Add one mana of any color another land you control could produce."

card.name: Boneminnow
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, you may surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Evaporate — {2}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Mill five cards.

card.name: Xirruphin, Fleeting
card.text: Flying Xirruphin, Fleeting enters with your choice of a vigilance or hexproof counter on it. Whenever Xirruphin attacks, create a token that's a copy of target nonland permanent. It gains haste until end of turn. Exile that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Mirroring Depths
card.text: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. Evaporate — {U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Chalice of the Cult
card.text: Chalice of the Cult enters with X charge counters on it. {U}: Counter target spell with mana value equal to the number of charge counters on Chalice of the Cult.

card.name: Nirvana
Observant Gemslinger
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you draw a card, you may put a charge counter on target artifact you control. {1}{U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Glimmertide Inventor
card.text: Flying Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a charge counter on each artifact you control.

card.name: Sea-Mad Pirate
card.text: When Sea-Mad Pirate enters or leaves, mill two cards. Evaporate — {2}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Surveil 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Wisp of Glimmers
card.text: Flying Evaporate — {2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Search your library for an artifact card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Undead Tentacle
card.text: Whenever Undead Tentacle blocks a creature, that creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.

card.name: Dismembered Leviathan
Brilliant Mechfly
card.text: Flying Whenever Brilliant Mechfly deals combat damage to a player, put a charge counter on it. Remove a charge counter from Brilliant Mechfly: Scry 2.

card.name: Twice Drowned
card.text: Counter target spell. Evaporate — {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Exile up to two instant or sorcery cards from target player's graveyard.

card.name: Unveil the Mists
card.text: Draw three cards, then discard a card unless you control a Mist.

card.name: Shadow Atlas
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. Put a charge counter on Shadow Atlas. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Shadow Atlas: Surveil 2, then draw a card. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Spellcharge Gem
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a charge counter on Spellcharge Gem. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Spellcharge Gem: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.

card.name: Arcane Battery
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control leaves the battlefield, put all charge counters from that artifact onto Arcane Battery. At the beginning of your upkeep, move up to two charge counters from Arcane Battery to target artifact you control.

card.name: Returned Ranksman
card.text: Haste When Returned Ranksman dies, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Generator Ritualist
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Generator Ritualist: Put two charge counters on target artifact.

card.name: Merchant of the Isles
card.text: When Merchant of the Isles enters, you mill three cards. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Vampiric Eagle
card.text: Flying Evaporate — {4}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Chargesap Martialist
card.text: Lifelink Whenever one or more charge counters are put on artifacts you control, you may pay {B}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Savacide Unearther
card.text: When Savacide Unearther enters, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Brier Slopes Brute
card.text: Menace When Brier Slopes Brute enters, Soldiers you control gain menace until end of turn.

card.name: Drag to the Depths
card.text: Exile up to two target creature cards from an opponent's graveyard. Evaporate — {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Necromantic Charge
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove X charge counters from artifacts you control. X target creatures you control get +1/+0 and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Harvest Intelligence
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Harvest Intelligence, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards. If the sacrificed creature was a Soldier, target opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Dragged Under
card.text: Target player discards two cards. You lose 2 life and mill three cards.

card.name: Gempoint Beam
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Rotting Current
card.text: Destroy target creature. Evaporate — {2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Jaws of the Depths
card.text: Menace, lifelink Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Evaporate — {3}{B}{B}{B}, Exile Jaws of the Depths from your graveyard: Each opponent sacrifices three creatures.

card.name: Depths' Lure
card.text: Deathtouch When Depths' Lure enters or dies, you lose 1 life, mill two cards, then draw a card. As long as there are five or more different mana values among cards in your graveyard and cards you own in exile, Depths' Lure gets +4/+4 and has flying.

card.name: Embittered Captain
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Embittered Captain attacks, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Iazoketh, Dire
card.text: Flying Iazoketh, Dire enters with your choice of a deathtouch or menace counter on it. Whenever Iazoketh attacks, other creatures get -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the amount of attacking creatures you control.

card.name: Dredging
card.text: You draw X cards and lose X life. Evaporate — {5}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard.

card.name: Soulcage
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control die, put two charge counters on Soulcage. {T}: Move up to two charge counters from Soulcage to target artifact you control. {1}{B}, {T}, Pay 1 life, Remove a charge counter from Soulcage: Draw a card.

card.name: Alakaslam, the Grey Dawn
Battlefield Soulstealer
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a Soldier you control dies, you may pay 1 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Cleric of the Five
card.text: Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, if Cleric of the Five isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of Cleric of the Five. Sacrifice five creatures named Cleric of the Five: Search your library for a Demon or Fish creature card and put it on the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Deepwater Lamia
card.text: When Deepwater Lamia enters, you mill three cards. Evaporate — {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Ravenous Drowned
card.text: Menace Evaporate — {2}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Clockwork Lich
card.text: Clockwork Lich's power is equal to the number of artifact cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Miser of the Drowned
card.text: Flying Ward— Pay 2 life. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only twice each turn.

card.name: Harvester of Sin
card.text: Whenever a Soldier you control dies, Harvester of Sin gets +1/+1 and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Forbidden Siphoner
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature you control dies or a card leaves your graveyard, put a charge counter on target artifact.

card.name: Disease in the Ranks
card.text: When Disease in the Ranks enters, target player discards a card and loses 1 life. Whenever a creature you control dies, you may return Disease in the Ranks to its owner's hand.

card.name: Revolutionary Murder
card.text: Destroy target creature with mana value 4 or less.

card.name: Emerge from Death
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature or artifact. Surveil 2. If you sacrificed a permanent this turn, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Siphoning Onyx
card.text: {T}, Remove a charge counter from Siphoning Onyx: Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Valey Shiftshield
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Gemfire Golem
card.text: Gemfire Golem gets +1/+0 for each charge counter on it. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Gemfire Golem: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast creature or artifact spells.

card.name: Merchant of the Capital
card.text: When Merchant of the Capital enters, it deals 1 damage to any target. {1}, {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Leader of the Phalanx
card.text: Menace {4}{R}: Create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Deceptive Chargemage
card.text: Whenever Deceptive Chargemage attacks, you may remove a charge counter from a Gem you control. If you do, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Sharean Banneret
card.text: When Sharean Banneret enters, creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ancient Maskbearer
card.text: When Ancient Maskbearer enters, you may sacrifice a Soldier. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Ancient Maskbearer, and it gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Prism Beam
card.text: Prism Beam deals 2 damage to any target. If you control a Gem, scry 1.

card.name: Improvised Armament
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains convert until end of turn. ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Draw a card.

card.name: Glimpse the Red Horizon
card.text: If this is the first spell you cast this turn, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. Otherwise, Glimpse the Red Horizon deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Scorch and Scour
card.text: Choose one — • Scorch and Scour deals 2 damage to target creature. If it would die this turn, exile it instead. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Accelerant Tactics
card.text: Choose one — • Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. • Create two 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens. • Destroy target land. Scry 1.

card.name: Shrouded Fireblast
card.text: This spell can't be countered. (This includes by the ward ability.) Shrouded Fireblast deals 6 damage to target creature.

card.name: Sir Mari, Bloodcrazed
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature you control would deal exactly 1 damage to a permanent or player, it deals 3 damage to that permanent or player instead.

card.name: Hurler of Armaments
card.text: During your turn, Hurler of Armaments has first strike. Whenever Hurler of Armaments deals combat damage to a player, you may discard a card. If you do, Hurler of Armaments deals 1 damage to that player.

card.name: Shiftspear Captain
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Shiftspear Captain becomes tapped, it deals damage equal to its power to target player.

card.name: Rylireor, Voiceless
card.text: Flying Rylireor, Voiceless enters with your choice of a haste or menace counter on it. Whenever Rylireor deals combat damage to a player, create X Treasure tokens, where X is the amount of damage dealt.

card.name: Inspired Blazeblade
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever one or more other Soldiers you control enter, double Inspired Blazeblade's power until end of turn.

card.name: Paindrinker Amulet
card.text: Whenever one or more other sources you control deal damage to a player, put a charge counter on Paindrinker Amulet. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Paindrinker Amulet: Paindrinker Amulet deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Rigor Mortis
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control that dealt combat damage this turn. During your turn, equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has first strike. Whenever equipped creature attacks, Rigor Mortis deals 2 damage to the defending player. Equip {2}

card.name: Sanguine Looter
card.text: Whenever a Soldier you control dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Captain of Possibility
card.text: When Captain of Possibility enters, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Armament Liege
card.text: Whenever one or more other Soldiers you control enter, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Bloodlustful Champion
card.text: As long as it's your turn, Bloodlustful Champion has first strike. Whenever Bloodlustful Champion deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Blazeblade Adept
card.text: Haste, menace, convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Flameharvest Warmage
card.text: Menace When Flameharvest Warmage deals combat damage to a player, add that much {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Dragonpoise Apprentice
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Dragonpoise Apprentice gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Split Focus
card.text: Split Focus deals 3 damage to any target. Target Soldier you control gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Brave the Mountaintops
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -0/-1. Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, discard up to X cards, where X is its power. When you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Dragonfire Ritual
card.text: Dragonfire Ritual deals 5 damage to any target. Add {R}.

card.name: Study the Martial Code
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. Create a 1/1 red Warrior creature token with convert.

card.name: Army-Fueled Firestorm
card.text: Army-Fueled Firestorm deals 2 damage to target player. Whenever a Soldier you control enters, you may pay {R}. If you do, return Army-Fueled Firestorm from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Oqtari Shiftsword
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Misthide Explorer
card.text: Sacrifice Misthide Explorer: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped or face-down, then shuffle.

card.name: Merchant of the Great Plains
card.text: When Merchant of the Great Plains enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Mist-Possessed Grizzly
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control transforms, Mist-Possessed Grizzly gets +1/+1 and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Oqtari Enforcer
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) When Oqtari Enforcer converts a creature, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Rallying Commander
card.text: When Rallying Commander enters, create two 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Tallest of the Ranks
card.text: Vigilance When Tallest of the Ranks attacks, it gets +1/+1 for each Soldier you control until end of turn.

card.name: Miststalker Behemoth
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control transforms, Miststalker Behemoth gets +1/+1 and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Rage Pheromone
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Both those creatures attack the next combat if able.

card.name: Underwater Scavenging
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Ironbark Invigoration
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+4 until end of turn. (Converting the target of this spell swaps these stats.)

card.name: Prod the Mist
card.text: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then, you may transform that land.

card.name: Commune with the Mist
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Soldierhoof Behemoth
card.text: Haste When Soldierhoof Behemoth enters, Soldiers you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the amount of Soldiers you control.

card.name: Yark, Shiftshield Reaver
card.text: Trample Whenever Yark, Shiftshield Reaver deals combat damage to a player, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the damage dealt. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them. If you do, put that card into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Mistcowl Druid
card.text: Reach Whenever a permanent you control transforms, you gain 1 life and draw a card. Activated abilities of lands you control cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Imologir, Ambitious
card.text: Flying Imologir, Ambitious enters with your choice of a trample or haste counter on it. Whenever Imologir attacks, you may have it fight target creature you don't control. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Imologir.

card.name: Mist Awakened
card.text: Search your library for up to eight land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Transform any number of lands you control.

card.name: Consolidation Captain
card.text: Trample Lands you control have "{1}{G}, {T}: Create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token."

card.name: Windbreaker
Woodland Recruiter
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Mist Tamer
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control transforms, create a 2/2 green Spectral Wolf creature token.

card.name: Ester Woods Protector
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Oqtari Champion
card.text: Vigilance, trample Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Oqtari Pathlighter
card.text: Trample When Oqtari Pathlighter deals combat damage to a player, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is this creature's power. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Survival Adept
card.text: Reach, deathtouch, lifelink

card.name: Mistborn Rejuvenator
card.text: Whenever one or more token creatures you control enter, you may pay {G}. If you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Mentoring Shiftsword
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) When Mentoring Shiftsword converts a creature, that creature gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Armament Supplier
card.text: When Armament Supplier enters, distribute three +1/+1 counters among one, two or three target Soldiers you control.

card.name: Pragmatic Weaponry
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. Until end of turn, that creature can't be blocked by creatures with power less than it.

card.name: Clash with the Army
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If the creature you control has power 4 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Eerie Propagation
card.text: Flash When Eerie Propagation enters, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn, then draw a card. Whenever a permanent you control transforms, you may return Eerie Propagation to its owner's hand.

card.name: Defensive Phalanx
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to you this turn. Create a number of 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Gem affinity
card.text: Colored artifact spells you control have affinity for artifacts. (Those spells cost {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) {T}: Untap target artifact you control. Double the amount of charge counters on it.

card.name: crazy white weenie
card.text: Double strike Whenever crazy white weenie attacks, other creatures you control with power 2 or less gain double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Emperor Enorim II
card.text: Trample, ward—Pay 2 life. Emperor Enorim II's power is equal to the amount of Soldiers you control. Whenever a nontoken Soldier you control dies, create X 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: The Grand Admiral
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Once each turn, you may put a card you own in exile with evaporate into your graveyard.

card.name: Prime Valeyan Ordun
card.text: Trample Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw that many cards, then discard that many cards. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Archdruid Olion
Convert bear
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, if it doesn't have the same power as another creature you control, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Convert bear. • You gain 2 life. • Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Captain Xanlos
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a Treasure. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player sacrifices a Treasure.) Whenever one or more creatures attack a player other than you, each player creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Stifle
card.text: Counter target permanent spell, activated ability, or triggered ability. Scry 1. If you control six or more lands, draw a card.

card.name: Mist Commander
card.text: Flying, trample, lifelink You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Whenever a permanent you control transforms, reveal the top five cards of your library. Put all land cards from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Aor'Il, Scourge of Esterlis
card.text: Menace You have no maximum hand size. Whenever you discard a card, return that card to your hand and draw a card. Evaporate — {2}{U}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Gain control of target creature.

card.name: Soldier buff
card.text: During your turn, Soldiers you control have first strike. Whenever one or more Soldiers you control deal combat damage to a player, you may pay 2 life. If you do, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: midrange naya dude
card.text: Trample, lifelink, haste

card.name: Tactical Phalanx
card.text: Tactical Phalanx enters with five +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever Tactical Phalanx deals combat damage to a player, you may remove a +1/+1 counter from it. When you do, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Orzhov Boardwipe
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Return target creature card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Lifesap Auditor
card.text: When Lifesap Auditor enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put the top two cards of your library into your graveyard. Whenever one or more creature cards are put into your graveyard, you may pay {B}. If you do, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Affinity Gem
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each charge counter on Affinity Gem. {U}{R}, {T}: Put a charge counter on Affinity Gem.

card.name: 2p matters
card.text: Haste Whenever another creature you control attacks, if it has power 2 or less, 2p matters deals 1 damage to each player.

card.name: Prime Counterspell
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell. If a spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Aggro Soldier tokens
card.text: Haste {T}: Create a number of 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens equal to the amount of creatures that attacked this turn.

card.name: Evap commander
card.text: If a permanent card would be put into exile from your graveyard, exile it with a drowned counter on it instead. You may cast spells from among cards you own in exile with drowned counters on them. When you do, they enter with a finality counter, and are 1/1 Spirits in addition to their other types.

card.name: Soldier Commander
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, choose up to one — • Return target Soldier card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. • Exile target Soldier card from your graveyard. Creatures you control get +1/+1 until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Evap enchantment
card.text: Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, draw a card, then discard a card, then put a [] counter on Evap enchantment. Activated abilities from cards in your graveyard cost {1} less to activate for each [] counter on Evap enchantment.

card.name: Gem Commander
card.text: Flying Gem Commander gets +1/+1 for each charge counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep and at the beginning of your end step, move any number of charge counters between permanents you control.

card.name: WUBRG Mist Ench
card.text: Mist creatures you control get +1/+1 and have flying and "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Whenever a land you control transforms, draw a card.

card.name: Millwipe
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Target player mills eight cards, then return target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Stuff the Unworthy
card.text: Attacking creatures target player controls get -4/-0 until end of turn. You mill three cards, then draw a card.

card.name: Supercharge Ritualist
card.text: If one or more charge counters would be put on a Gem you control, that many plus one charge counters are put on that Gem instead. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on target Gem you control.

card.name: Avenger Bloodknight
card.text: Haste {1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice Avenger Bloodknight: Creatures you control gain haste and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Valiant Recruiter
card.text: When Valiant Recruiter or another nontoken Soldier you control enters, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Jungleborn Scout
card.text: Vigilance Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Jungleborn Scout deals combat damage to a player, you may put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Treasure Sifter
card.text: Lifelink, deathtouch Whenever Treasure Sifter enters or dies, mill three cards.

card.name: Peninsula Marauder
card.text: Haste, convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Peninsula Marauder deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until end of turn.

card.name: Gemflinging
card.text: Gemflinging deals 2 damage to any target. Scry 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Beacon Over the Oceans
card.text: You may play an additional land this turn. Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Guide to War's End
card.text: {B}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain X life, where X is that creature's power. If that creature was a Soldier, draw a card. Activate only once per turn.

card.name: Chrome Drake
card.text: Flying When Chrome Drake enters, you gain 2 life, draw two cards, then discard two cards. Evaporate — {2}{W}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: You gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Orb of Pained Knowledge
card.text: {T}, Remove a charge counter from Orb of Pained Knowledge: You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Jungle Mission Specialist
card.text: Whenever Jungle Mission Specialist attacks, Soldiers you control get +1/+0 and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Wrathful Champion
card.text: Trample Whenever a Soldier you control attacks, Wrathful Champion gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Jungleborn Mentor
card.text: Whenever Jungleborn Mentor deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on up to X target creatures, where X is its power.

card.name: Warfallen Angel
card.text: Flying, menace, deathtouch Evaporate — {3}{W}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a flying counter, a menace counter, and a deathtouch counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Regiment Pathmaker
card.text: Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less attacks, if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card. Otherwise, Regiment Pathmaker gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Spelldrinker Pendant
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a charge counter on Spelldrinker Pendant. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Spelldrinker Pendant: Add {U} or {R}. Spelldrinker Pendant deals 2 damage to target player.

card.name: Sylran, Many-Horned
card.text: Vigilance, trample Sylran, Many-Horned's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.

card.name: Resolute Deathmarcher
card.text: Deathtouch When Resolute Deathmarcher or another Soldier you control dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Phantasmal Eagle
card.text: Flying Evaporate — {WU}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Radiance Collector
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, you may pay {UB}. If you do, put a charge counter on target artifact you control.

card.name: Pervasive Militocrat
card.text: Whenever one or more Soldiers you control attack, Pervasive Militocrat deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: Army of Two
card.text: When Army of Two enters, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Stalwart Scout
card.text: Vigilance Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.) Whenever Stalwart Scout attacks, it gets +0/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Soul-Siphon Warlock
card.text: Lifelink Evaporate — {4}{WB}{WB}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target player loses life equal to the mana value of target creature you control, and you gain that much life.

card.name: Regiment Scout
card.text: Regiment Scout has double strike as long as it's your turn. Whenever one or more creatures you control with power 2 or less attack, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until end of turn.

card.name: Glimmermage Adept
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell on each of your turns, add {U} or {R}. Spend this mana only to cast an instant, sorcery or Gem spell.

card.name: Great Plains Guide
card.text: When Great Plains Guide enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a land card from among them. If you do, put that card into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Exploiter of Undergrowth
card.text: Deathtouch When Exploiter of Undergrowth enters, sacrifice a creature. When you do, surveil 2. If the sacrificed creature was a Soldier, draw a card.

card.name: Shirley
card.text: Flying Whenever Shirley deals combat damage to a creature, tap that creature and put a stun counter on it. You may pay {U}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Karan Kurem
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Karan Kurem enters, gain control of target creature with mana value 4 or less. It's a 4/4 Thrall in addition to its other types for as long as you control that creature.

card.name: Arxikas
card.text: Other Spiders you control get +1/+1. When Arxikas enters, it deals 2 damage to each other creature. Whenever a creature dies this turn, create a 1/0 black Spider Illusion creature token.

card.name: Baldan Wazu
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 Warrior creature token with convert. Baldan Wazu deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Ovno Zig
card.text: Ovno Zig can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Whenever Ovno Zig deals combat damage to a player, scry X, where X is its power, then draw a card. {G}: Ovno Zig gets +1/+1 or -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Crest of Radiance
card.text: Choose one — • Put a charge counter on each Gem you control. • Counter target creature or artifact spell.

card.name: Crest of Magma
card.text: Choose one — • Draw cards equal to the power of target creature you control. • Crest of Magma deals 2 damage to each attacking creature.

card.name: Crest of Waves
card.text: Choose one — • Target player mills six cards. • Destroy target noncreature, nonland permanent.

card.name: Crest of Ruby
card.text: Choose one — • Exile the top two cards of your library. You may cast them this turn. • Create two 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Crest of Ironbark
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for a land card, reveal it and put it into your hand. You gain 2 life. • Scry X, where X is the number of lands you control, then draw a card.

card.name: Gemcraft Filigree
card.text: Remove a charge counter from Gemcraft Filigree: Gemcraft Filigree gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Statue of Golden Victory
card.text: Soldiers you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Unstable Silumgite
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Put a charge counter on Unstable Silumgite. {T}, Remove three charge counters from Unstable Silumgite, Sacrifice Unstable Silumgite: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Brilliant Crest
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}, Remove a charge counter from Brilliant Crest: Add two mana of any color.

card.name: Explorer's Scope
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Yarkasing Landmark
card.text: When Yarkasing Landmark enters, search your library for a basic Forest, Mountain or Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {W}{RG}, {T}, Sacrifice Yarkasing Landmark: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Opaelian Landmark
card.text: When Opaelian Landmark enters, search your library for a basic Island, Mountain or Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {B}{UR}, {T}, Sacrifice Opaelian Landmark: Put a charge counter on target artifact.

card.name: Savacide Landmark
card.text: When Savacide Landmark enters, search your library for a basic Island, Plains or Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {U}{WB}, {T}, Sacrifice Savacide Landmark: Mill three cards.

card.name: Sharean Landmark
card.text: When Sharean Landmark enters, search your library for a basic Forest, Mountain or Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {R}{BG}, {T}, Sacrifice Sharean Landmark: Create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Avendwell Landmark
card.text: When Avendwell Landmark enters, search your library for a basic Forest, Island or Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {G}{WU}, {T}, Sacrifice Avendwell Landmark: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Trail of Dragons
card.text: Trail of Dragons enters tapped. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Mist {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Iarla, Eternal

card.name: Iarla, Eternal
card.text: Flying When Iarla, Eternal transforms, put your choice of a trample, double strike or hexproof counter on it. Whenever Iarla, Eternal attacks, search your library for a land or Dragon card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. --- (Front): Trail of Dragons

card.name: The Kaleidoscope Hollow
card.text: The Kaleidoscope Hollow enters tapped. When The Kaleidoscope Hollow enters, choose a color. {T}: Add {W} or one mana of the chosen color. Mist {2}{W} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Risen Mist

card.name: Risen Mist
card.text: Risen Mist can't be blocked. When Risen Mist deals combat damage to a player, add one mana of any color. --- (Front): The Kaleidoscope Hollow

card.name: Savacide Council
card.text: Savacide Council enters tapped. When Savacide Council enters, you may have it become a copy of any land on the battlefield, except it has mist {2}{U}{U}. {T}: Add {U}. Mist {2}{U}{U} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Aberrant Reflection

card.name: Aberrant Reflection
card.text: Bank of the Council can't be blocked. When Bank of the Council deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target permanent. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step. --- (Front): Savacide Council

card.name: Ailen'Or, Ruined City
card.text: Ailen'Or, Ruined City enters tapped. {T}, Sacrifice a creature: You lose X life and add X {B}, where X is the sacrificed creature's power. Mist {3}{B}{B} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Specter of the Last Drow

card.name: Specter of the Last Drow
card.text: Specter of the Last Drow can't be blocked. Whenever Specter of the Last Drow deals combat damage to a player, that player sacrifices a creature. You gain X life, where X is that creature's power. --- (Front): Ailen'Or, Ruined City

card.name: Thov Da'Rul
card.text: Thov Da'Rul enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {2}{R}{R}, {T}: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Mist {2}{R} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Engulfed Statue

card.name: Engulfed Statue
card.text: First strike Engulfed Statue can't be blocked. Whenever Engulfed Statue deals combat damage to a player, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. --- (Front): Thov Da'Rul

card.name: Woods of Ester
card.text: Woods of Ester enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {3}{G}{G}, {T}: Target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is its power. Mist {2}{G} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Witchlights of the Woods

card.name: Witchlights of the Woods
card.text: Witchlights of the Woods can't be blocked. Whenever Witchlights of the Woods deals combat damage to a player, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. --- (Front): Woods of Ester

card.name: Frosted Plain
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) Frosted Plain enters tapped. Mist {4}{WU} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Frozen Wisp

card.name: Frozen Wisp
card.text: Flying --- (Front): Frosted Plain

card.name: Cerulean Fogbank
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) Cerulean Fogbank enters tapped. Mist {4}{UB} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Chilled Wisp

card.name: Chilled Wisp
card.text: Menace --- (Front): Cerulean Fogbank

card.name: Ashy Badlands
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) Ashy Badlands enters tapped. Mist {4}{BR} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Ashen Wisp

card.name: Ashen Wisp
card.text: Haste --- (Front): Ashy Badlands

card.name: Foggy Peak
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) Foggy Peak enters tapped. Mist {4}{RG} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Mountainside Wisp

card.name: Mountainside Wisp
card.text: Trample --- (Front): Foggy Peak

card.name: Morningdew Vale
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) Morningdew Vale enters tapped. Mist {4}{GW} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Dewdrop Wisp

card.name: Dewdrop Wisp
card.text: Vigilance --- (Front): Morningdew Vale

card.name: Overcast Marsh
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) Overcast Marsh enters tapped. Mist {4}{WB} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Putrid Wisp

card.name: Putrid Wisp
card.text: Lifelink --- (Front): Overcast Marsh

card.name: Sandstorm Steppe
card.text: Mist {4}{RW} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) Sandstorm Steppe enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. --- (Back): Sandblast Wisp

card.name: Sandblast Wisp
card.text: Haste --- (Front): Sandstorm Steppe

card.name: Limestone Steam Pool
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) Limestone Steam Pool enters tapped. Mist {4}{UR} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Sulfuric Wisp

card.name: Sulfuric Wisp
card.text: Flying --- (Front): Limestone Steam Pool

card.name: Misty Taiga
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {G}.) Misty Taiga enters tapped. Mist {4}{GU} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Everfrost Wisp

card.name: Everfrost Wisp
card.text: Vigilance --- (Front): Misty Taiga

card.name: Shaded Woods
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Shaded Woods enters tapped. Mist {4}{BG} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Dank Wisp

card.name: Dank Wisp
card.text: Deathtouch --- (Front): Shaded Woods

card.name: Remote Barracks
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Mist {3} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Rimefrost Bank

card.name: Rimefrost Bank
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Rimefrost Bank, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token. {T}: Add {C}. --- (Front): Remote Barracks

card.name: Murky Vista
card.text: Murky Vista enters tapped. When Murky Vista enters, add one mana of any color. {T}: Add {C}. Mist {3} (You may transform this card any time you could cast an instant for its mist cost.) --- (Back): Materialized Fog

card.name: Materialized Fog
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Materialized Fog, add one mana of any color. {T}: Add {C}. --- (Front): Murky Vista

card.name: Copy IRA
card.text: This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.

card.name: Treasure IRA
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Warrior IRA
card.text: Convert ({T}: Target creature you control switches its power and toughness until end of turn.)

card.name: Reflective Mist IRA
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color another land you control could produce.
